title: Linting WIDTHEXPAND, WIDTHTRUNC for if branches inside always on parameter as condition

features.name: constant_param_in_always_comb_if_condition
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with an if statement whose condition is a constant parameter comparison, where the parameter value makes the branch unreachable

features.name: width_expansion_in_unreachable_branch
features.description: Code should include an assignment in an unreachable always_comb branch where a narrow constant is assigned to a wider signal, triggering incorrect width expansion warning
